title: Alibaba Launches Token Plan Personal Version, Qwen3.8-Max-Preview Goes Live Simultaneously
excerpt: On July 19, Alibaba officially launched the Token Plan Personal Edition and simultaneously opened the Qwen3.8-Max-Preview experience. This model has a parameter
content_html:
On July 19, Alibaba officially launched the Token Plan Personal Edition and simultaneously opened the Qwen3.8-Max-Preview experience. This model has a parameter scale of 2.4 trillion and demonstrates strong capabilities in scenarios such as code engineering and professional office work. The official version is expected to be released and open-sourced shortly.

According to the information, Qwen3.8-Max-Preview can currently be experienced through the Token Plan. To lower the user's entry barrier, Alibaba has launched a limited-time discount plan, with the Personal Edition Lite package priced at 39 yuan/month, Standard package at 139 yuan/month, and Pro package at 499 yuan/month; the Team Edition offers three types of positions: Standard, Advanced, and Premium, priced at 150 yuan, 550 yuan, and 1398 yuan per position per month, respectively.

For Qwen3.8-Max-Preview, Alibaba also launched a limited-time trial activity, with daytime Credits consumption reduced to 10% of the original price. Personal Token Plan users can enjoy further discounts when using it at night.

In addition to the Token Plan, Alibaba's AI programming products Qoder and QoderWork have also been launched with support for Qwen3.8-Max-Preview. Qwen PC users can freely experience the model's capabilities.

As the competition in large models shifts from purely performance-based comparisons to a comprehensive competition involving model capabilities, cost control, and ecosystem building, Alibaba is further expanding the application range of the Qwen series models through the Token Plan, development tools, and open-source strategies, accelerating the adoption of large models in productivity scenarios such as development and office work.

sentences.en: As the competition in large models shifts from purely performance-based comparisons to a comprehensive competition involving model capabilities, cost control, and ecosystem building, Alibaba is further expanding the application range of the Qwen series models through the Token Plan, development tools, and open-source strategies, accelerating the adoption of large models in productivity scenarios such as development and office work.
sentences.zh: 随着大模型的竞争从单纯的性能对比转向模型能力、成本控制、生态建设等方面的综合竞争，阿里巴巴正通过Token计划、开发工具、开源策略进一步拓展Qwen系列模型的应用范围，加速大模型在开发、办公等生产力场景的落地。

content_html_zh:
7月19日，阿里巴巴正式上线Token计划个人版，并同步开放Qwen3.8-Max-Preview体验。 该模型参数规模达2.4万亿，在代码工程、专业办公等场景展现出强大的能力。 预计正式版将于近期发布并开源。

据了解，Qwen3.8-Max-Preview目前可以通过Token Plan进行体验。 为降低用户准入门槛，阿里巴巴推出限时优惠计划，个人版Lite套餐价格39元/月，标准套餐139元/月，Pro套餐499元/月；团队版提供标准、高级、高级三种职位，每个职位每月价格分别为150元、550元、1398元。

针对Qwen3.8-Max-Preview，阿里巴巴还推出限时试用活动，白天积分消费降为原价10%。 个人代币计划用户夜间使用可享受进一步折扣。

除了Token Plan之外，阿里巴巴的AI编程产品Qoder和QoderWork也已上线，支持Qwen3.8-Max-Preview。 Qwen PC用户可以自由体验该模型的功能。

随着大模型的竞争从单纯的性能对比转向模型能力、成本控制、生态建设等方面的综合竞争，阿里巴巴正通过Token计划、开发工具、开源策略进一步拓展Qwen系列模型的应用范围，加速大模型在开发、办公等生产力场景的落地。
